stories.definitionOfDone: • Architecture Design: Design of the authentication and authorization module, including user roles and permissions. • Database Schema Design: Design of the user account and patient information tables, including data relationships and constraints. • User Training Documentation: User training documentation on authentication and authorization procedures.
stories.description: The system must allow authorized users to access and manage patient information.

stories.title: Allow Authorized Users To Access
